name: components

files.content:
"use client";

export {Collection, ListBoxLoadMoreItem, RouterProvider, I18nProvider} from "react-aria-components";

visual_summary: Imports and exports components from 'react-aria-components'. Use this component when working with ARIA-compliant UI components in your React application.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: components
Description: Imports and exports components from 'react-aria-components'. Use this component when working with ARIA-compliant UI components in your React application.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: import, export, react-aria-components

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
